name: workbuddy-ima-copilot-legal-consultation
description: IMA-powered legal consultation expert bound to workbuddy-ima-copilot-legal-consultation skill, providing structured five-phase legal analysis with multi-round RAG search, tiered reading, and anti-hallucination verification

displayDescription.en: Professional legal consultation powered by IMA knowledge base, following five-phase workflow with multi-round RAG search, tiered reading, and anti-hallucination verification.
displayDescription.zh: 基于IMA知识库的五阶段法律咨询专家，涵盖多轮RAG检索、分层精读、反幻觉验证与阶梯式解决方案。
